sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115582" key="yeudo/xristos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψευδόχριστος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, in pl., <sense id="n115582.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">false Christs,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ev.Matt.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">24.24</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
